name: Digital Chief of Staff — Workato Native Blueprint
summary: Production-grade Workato blueprint that uses Recipe Functions, a Backstory custom connector, and native Slack and Google Calendar connectors instead of generic HTTP steps.

native_connectors_required: Recipe function by Workato for reusable subflows
Backstory custom connector built with the Connector SDK
Slack connector or Workbot for Slack for channel and DM delivery
Google Calendar connector for task and event creation
prohibited_patterns: No repeated Universal HTTP or custom-action calls for Slack delivery
No repeated raw HTTP calls for Google Calendar writes
No credentials stored in formula literals, project properties, or step comments
No agent output sent directly to transport without JSON schema validation

recipe_functions.purpose: Normalize schedule and manual invocations into one run_context object.
Return normalized source_record items for account-channel updates.
Return normalized source_record items for the executive briefing and task plan.
Map account and owner data to the final Slack destination.
Convert structured synthesis JSON into the delivery_payload contract.
Publish the deterministic summary of the run to the configured summary channel.

steps: Call Backstory custom connector actions for enrichment
Use LLM connector or AI step to return strict JSON for the account update
Post to Slack using the Slack connector
Use LLM connector or AI step to return strict JSON for the briefing
Create Google Calendar events with the Google Calendar connector
Send DM briefing using the Slack connector

main_recipes.trigger: API Platform endpoint or Slack/Workbot command trigger
steps: Reuse the same recipe functions as the scheduled recipe
Skip channel fan-out when the request is explicitly single-user

deployment_notes: Use project properties or connection objects for routing defaults and source base URLs.
Expose Backstory through a custom connector or approved connector package, not scattered HTTP actions.
Prefer Recipe Functions over legacy callable recipes for new builds.
